description.short: Flowing vine motif with soft floral blooms for romantic silhouettes.
description.full:
Pattern Profile

  • Motif: Continuous vine and petal clusters
  • Best For: Sleeves, overlays, and fitted bodices
  • Visual Mood: Romantic and delicate

Notes

  • Pairs beautifully with matte satin linings
  • Works well with pearl or clear bead accents

description.short: A cleaner geometric lace look for modern bridal styling.
description.full:
Pattern Profile

  • Motif: Geometric mesh with tiny blossom nodes
  • Best For: Structured bodices and clean A-line gowns
  • Visual Mood: Modern and polished

Notes

  • Looks sharp with minimal seams
  • Great option for contemporary bridal direction
